name: Cation
author: Luis Bolaños Mures (2016) / AGP port
description: Drawless square-board connection game with ko fights (Bolaños Mures, 2016). Connect your two edges with an orthogonal chain. You may form a crosscut (a 2x2 of two black + two white diagonal pairs) only against stones older than your opponent's latest — and whenever a crosscut exists, its resolution is forced: the player to move must lift one of their stones out of it and replay it elsewhere.
